title: Importance of Accessibility
description: A project designed to highlight the importance of web accessibility. It uses ARIA roles and attributes to improve screen reader support and ensures full keyboard navigation for a better user experience across all abilities.

title: Training Den
description: Training Den is a training management platform that helps organizations assign, track, and manage employee training programs. The application provides administrators with tools to monitor progress, view completions, and oversee training activity through a centralized dashboard.

title: TheSonoraGrill
description: website redesign for The Sonora Grill a local Mexican restaurant in Ogden. Collaborated closely with the restaurant owner and manager to redesign the website for better alignment with the restaurant's brand identity and overall aesthetic.

title: BookHive
description: A collaborative library app that helps users track reading, discover new books, and enage with others thorugh discussion posts. It also allows users to create personal shelves to enhance organization and book management.
